title: Nested blocks of code should not be left empty
description: Avoid leaving empty nested blocks of code as they can lead to confusion and potential errors.

noncompliant.description: Empty nested block after if condition

why_is_this_an_issue: Empty nested blocks can lead to confusion and potential errors.
how_to_fix: Remove the empty nested block or add code inside it.

metadata.title: Nested blocks of code should not be left empty
